top3.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
ORDER BY COUNT(b.Id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
ORDER BY COUNT(b.Id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(badge_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS badge_count
        FROM badges
        GROUP BY UserId
    )
);

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
ORDER BY COUNT(b.Id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(badge_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS badge_count
        FROM badges
        GROUP BY UserId
    )
);

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(b.Id) = (
    SELECT MAX(badge_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(b2.Id) AS badge_count
        FROM badges b2
        GROUP BY b2.UserId
    )
);

final.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
ORDER BY COUNT(b.Id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
